ValidationRule.description: Restricts user from moving the deal status past documentation stage until Lease Documentation Approval % is at 100% for all AiDs related to the deal.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( pro_Bypass_Documentation_Approval__c ), pro_Of_AiDs_With_Documentation_Approved__c < 1, ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Deal_Status__c , 'Closed - Won') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Lease Documentation Approval must be at 100% for all related AiDs before moving past the 'Documentation' stage
